examples: There is an abundance of evidence to support the motivational benefits that result from carefully matching people to jobs.
Teachers reported significant motivational changes in 27% of the children in the growth mind-set workshop as compared with only 9% of students in the control group.
The family of Alexander, a 30-year-old Mormon motivational speaker and salesman, wept during the evidence.
Endurance increased in both groups listening to music, although the motivational music had the greatest effect.
